context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the Akeneo OAuth2 client credentials flow with token caching, uses the proper pagination pattern for Akeneo's REST API, implements incremental sync using the updated filter, and builds a resilient per-product error isolation pattern.

checklist.name: Basic Auth encoding
checklist.description: The token request uses Basic Auth with base64-encoded clientId:clientSecret in the Authorization header (Buffer.from(`${clientId}:${clientSecret}`).toString('base64') or equivalent)

checklist.name: grant_type password
checklist.description: The token request body includes grant_type: 'password' along with username and password fields

checklist.name: Token expiry buffer
checklist.description: Token cache check uses a buffer before expiry (e.g., tokenExpiry > Date.now() + 60000 or similar positive offset) rather than checking exact expiry

checklist.name: Token expiry calculation
checklist.description: Token expiry is calculated as Date.now() + expires_in * 1000 (or equivalent ms conversion from seconds)

checklist.name: Pagination via _embedded.items
checklist.description: Paginated getAll uses page._embedded?.items (or _embedded.items) to extract results from each page response

checklist.name: Pagination next link
checklist.description: Paginated getAll follows _links.next.href (stripping the base URL) to advance to the next page

checklist.name: Incremental sync filter
checklist.description: The sync job uses an 'updated' search filter with operator '>' and a stored ISO timestamp (e.g., search={"updated":[{"operator":">","value":"..."}]})

checklist.name: with_attribute_options param
checklist.description: Product fetch requests include with_attribute_options=true as a query parameter

checklist.name: Per-product error isolation
checklist.description: Each product's processing is wrapped in a try/catch so that a failure on one product does not stop processing of remaining products

checklist.name: Error logging with identifier
checklist.description: Caught errors are logged with the product's identifier (SKU/identifier field) included in the error message or log entry

checklist.name: akeneoUpdatedAt stored
checklist.description: The upsert/save operation includes the Akeneo product's 'updated' timestamp stored as a separate field (e.g., akeneoUpdatedAt)

checklist.name: File structure
checklist.description: Client is placed in lib/akeneo/client.ts and sync job in jobs/akeneo-sync.ts (or a close equivalent following the same convention)

checklist.name: Sync state persistence
checklist.description: The sync job reads a last-sync timestamp before fetching and updates it after a successful sync run
